headline: 3M (MMM) Signs Long Term Airbus A220 Supply Deal For Aircraft Insulation
summary: 3M (NYSE:MMM) signed a long term supply agreement with Airbus to provide advanced thermal and acoustic insulation systems for the Airbus A220. The agreement focuses on materials that target passenger comfort and aircraft operational performance in the A220 program. The deal extends 3M's role as a key materials supplier within commercial aviation. For investors watching 3M, this Airbus agreement fits within the company's core strength in specialized materials across industrial and...
